instruction:
Add comprehensive edge case tests for `encode_string2`.


Existing tests for reference:
```r

```


The existing tests cover basic functionality. Add tests for:
1. NULL inputs to each argument
2. Empty vectors/strings: character(0), "", integer(0)
3. Boundary values: 0, 1, -1, NA, NaN, Inf
4. Invalid input types (passing numeric where character expected, etc.)
5. Missing arguments (use expect_error with class matching)
6. Very long inputs (strings > 1000 chars, vectors > 10000 elements)
context:
Package: httr2 v1.2.2.9000
Description: Perform HTTP Requests and Process the Responses
Function: encode_string2
Parameters: x
Test patterns used: test_that
Expectations used: expect_equal, expect_snapshot

Function Code:
```r
encode_string2 <- function(x) {
  supports_raw_string <- getRversion() >= "4.0.0"

  has_double_quote <- grepl('"', x, fixed = TRUE)
  has_single_quote <- grepl("'", x, fixed = TRUE)
  use_double <- !has_double_quote | has_single_quote
  out <- ifelse(
    use_double,
    encodeString(x, quote = '"'),
    encodeString(x, quote = "'")
  )
  if (supports_raw_string) {
    has_unprintable <- grepl("[^[[:cntrl:]]]", x)
    x_encoded <- encodeString(x)
    has_both_quotes <- has_double_quote & has_single_quote
    use_raw_string <- !has_unprintable & (x != x_encoded | has_both_quotes)
    out[use_raw_string] <- paste0('r"---{', x[use_raw_string], '}---"')
  }

  names(out) <- names(x)
  out
}
```
